title: Related lifecycle contract
observed_problem: Related screening was concentrated in a pre-pass and final baseline check rather than preserved as a stage-by-stage lineage contract.
Candidate-to-candidate relations could be lost before production IDs existed.
A newer article date could be mistaken for a distinct follow-up without proving a new execution anchor.
Legacy cards contain dangling Related IDs that were not caught by the new-card merge flow.

stage_requirements.prompt_0_8: candidate-spec to production-ID resolution and merged validation

guardrails: shared company, sector, chemistry, location or keyword is not sufficient
distinct follow-up requires a direct fresh execution anchor
same-event duplicate sources must be preserved as reinforcement candidates
no automatic legacy retargeting by title similarity
production merge must fail on dangling, self, duplicate or unresolved links
